reason: Six head-and-shoulders views (two rows of front/three-quarter/profile) of one consistent woman; clearly morena brown-skinned Filipina, mid-20s, oval face, dark eyes, dark hair in low messy bun with loose face-framing strands, gold hoop earrings, minimal makeup, neutral relaxed expression, plain mid-grey studio bg, even lighting. Photoreal DAZ/Iray CGI style, not 2D. Identity consistent across all views; clean symmetric eyes/ears, no extra/melted features, no extra limbs, no baked text. Skin tone reads distinctly brown — not fair/Korean. Usable as identity anchor.
